description: Blue Rabbit is a girl who wears fashion with a natural sense of style. She is dressed in a white one-piece dress layered with an apron dress and a coordinating head accessory adorned with clover flowers. The white one-piece dress has a lace base with delicate embroidery on the bodice and is trimmed with picot lace. The sleeves are made of a fabric that looks as if it is covered with flowers, and the skirt is made of a softly woven fabric. Semi-long pettipants are worn under the dress. The apron dress is printed with an original textile depicting lily of the valley, grasses and flowers, butterflies and blue rabbits. Gray lace is sandwiched between the two sides. The back style is also cute with a large ribbon tied around the back. Fashion accessories include a tulle lace head accessory decorated with clover flowers and a bag made of linen. She is wearing green socks and black strap shoes. Her face type is Radiance Evolution in the colour Fair. She has light brown hair that is long with a loose perm and bangs. She has light green eyeshadow with salmon pink lips and cheek. The eye colour is a special light brown in a frontward gaze.
